title: Required Monitoring Device Fails Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action requires active monitoring, but the required monitoring device fails before execution.
initial_state: The action was authorized while monitoring capability was available.
state_transition: The required monitoring device fails before execution.
execution_boundary: The monitored clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires availability of required monitoring resources.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because required monitoring cannot be provided.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required monitoring resources fail.
